title: App Settings - General - Account - Share Data section is not visible for logged User
scenario: Logged-in user navigates to App Settings > General > Account and does not see a "Share Data" section, only "Your Account" with name, email, and active "Log out" button.
expected: Account expands with "Your Account" section showing user's name and email, an active "Log out" button, and no "Share Data" section visible.
